"'''The Apprentice'''" is a comic appearing in ''[[Star Wars Tales 17]]'' and collected in ''[[Star Wars Tales Volume 5]]''.

==Plot summary==
The [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Finn (Sith)|Finn]] and his apprentice are on an outlying world, having set off an explosion in a building. On their way back to their ship, they are stopped by [[Lod]], a [[Toydarian/Legends|Toydarian]] who offers Finn [[Marka]], his blue-haired [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Slavery/Legends|slave]] [[Gender/Legends|girl]]. When Marka refuses to show Finn her teeth, Lod hits her, causing the apprentice to angrily yell at him to stop. When Lod tells Finn that he should keep a closer eye on his slave, the apprentice screams that he is not a slave, and kills Lod with his [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]].

Finn scolds the apprentice for showing compassion, a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] trait, and Marka asks to be taken with them, using a [[Mind trick/Legends|mind trick]] on the apprentice. Finn says that he has no need for a slave and already has an apprentice, and the two [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] leave, heading back to their ship. Finn orders the apprentice to deal with Marka as he heads to the top of the building their landing pad is on. A few minutes later the apprentice returns with Marka in tow, having been unable to kill her. Finn once more tells Marka that he already has an apprentice.

In response, Marka snatches the apprentice's lightsaber and pushes him off the building to his death. Finn's only response is to ask Marka if she was coming or not.
